content.intro: Properties are the foundation of your portfolio in PropertyGoose. Adding a property allows you to link it to landlords, track compliance certificates, and use it when creating references and tenancies.

steps.title: Navigate to Properties
steps.content: Click 'Properties' in the sidebar to open the Properties page.

steps.title: Click 'Add Property'
steps.content: Click the 'Add Property' button in the top right corner.

steps.title: Enter the address
steps.content: Start typing the property address. The autocomplete will suggest matching addresses. Select the correct one, or switch to manual entry mode using the toggle.

steps.title: Fill in property details
steps.content: Add information like property type (house, flat, etc.), number of bedrooms, and any other relevant details.

steps.title: Assign a landlord (optional)
steps.content: If you've already added the landlord, you can link them to this property now. Otherwise, you can do this later.

steps.title: Save the property
steps.content: Click 'Save Property' to add it to your portfolio.

sections.title: Bulk Import
sections.content: Need to add many properties at once? Click 'Import CSV' to upload a spreadsheet of properties. Download the template first to see the required format.

sections.title: Property Stats
sections.content: The Properties page shows stats at the top: Total Properties, Vacant (not currently let), In Tenancy (currently let), and Compliance Issues (expired or expiring certificates).
